sub_modules.aes128_key_expand: Combinational AES-128 key expansion producing all eleven round keys.
sub_modules.aes128_inv_round: One standard AES inverse decryption round: InvShiftRows, InvSubBytes, AddRoundKey, InvMixColumns.
sub_modules.aes128_inv_final_round: Final AES inverse round without InvMixColumns.
sub_modules.aes128_inv_shiftrows: Combinational AES inverse row rotation stage.
sub_modules.aes128_inv_subbytes: Combinational inverse S-box substitution for all state bytes.
sub_modules.aes128_inv_mixcolumns: Combinational inverse MixColumns over four AES columns.
